context: Tests whether the agent uses inline fragments for polymorphic Magento product types, includes aggregations for faceted filtering, correctly queries stock_status at the variant level for configurable products, and produces pagination-aware product list queries.

checklist.name: SimpleProduct inline fragment
checklist.description: The product query includes a `... on SimpleProduct` inline fragment to access simple-product-specific fields

checklist.name: ConfigurableProduct inline fragment
checklist.description: The product query includes a `... on ConfigurableProduct` inline fragment for configurable-product-specific fields

checklist.name: Configurable options queried
checklist.description: Inside the `... on ConfigurableProduct` fragment, `configurable_options` is queried (e.g. attribute_code, label, values)

checklist.name: Variant stock at product level
checklist.description: Stock status is queried on `variants.product` (the simple product inside the variant), NOT on the parent configurable product field directly

checklist.name: Aggregations in product list query
checklist.description: The product list query includes an `aggregations` field (with at minimum attribute_code and options sub-fields) to support faceted filtering

checklist.name: Pagination fields
checklist.description: The product list query includes `page_info` with at least `current_page` and `total_pages` (or `total_count`) for pagination

checklist.name: pageSize and currentPage variables
checklist.description: The query accepts `$pageSize` and `$currentPage` as GraphQL variables (not hardcoded inline)

checklist.name: Filter variable used
checklist.description: The query accepts a `$filter` variable of type `ProductAttributeFilterInput` (or equivalent) for category or attribute filtering

checklist.name: Search variable used
checklist.description: The query accepts a `$search` variable to support keyword search on the `products` field

checklist.name: Sort by position
checklist.description: The products query uses `sort: { position: ASC }` or includes a sort parameter

checklist.name: Visibility note or handling
checklist.description: NOTES.md or code comments mention that products set to 'Not Visible Individually' will not appear in catalog queries

checklist.name: Small image / thumbnail
checklist.description: Product query requests `small_image` or `thumbnail` with `url` and `label` for listing images
